Foucault — A Study in Knowledge & Order

TitleFoucault — A Study in Knowledge & Order
Year2024
Category
EditorialBookPoster
Tag
PhilosophyMichel Foucault

Title

Foucault — A Study in Knowledge & Order

This editorial design reinterprets two seminal works by Michel Foucault—The Order of Things and The Archaeology of Knowledge. The project explores how systems of knowledge are constructed, organized, and transformed over time, translating abstract philosophical structures into a visual language of form, hierarchy, and material.

Exposed Smyth Sewn Binding

(01)

The Order of Things

(02)

Structural Order

(03)

Order is, at one and the same time, that which is given in things and that which must be discovered.

Michel Foucault

The Archaeology of Knowledge

(04)

Typographic Hierarchy

(05)

Poster Design

(07)

Systematic Arrangement

(06)

System of Thought

(08)

Between Text and Structure

(09)

Knowledge Mapping

(10)

Michel Foucault Book Design

This work traces the underlying structures through which knowledge is formed and understood.

Through form, hierarchy, and composition, it reflects a quiet order embedded within systems of thought.
